feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Option to hide "Allow employees to enter an introductory text"
entry.content: My customer is testing the new People Profile and would like to hide the option for employees to enter an introductory text.  Is this possible?  They are concerned about the inability to efficiently monitor this field to ensure an employee does not write anything offensive or inappropriate.

entry.title: Automatic welcome mail to new hires
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we are currently doing a new implementation of SuccessFactors Recruiting. We would like to automatically trigger a welcome email after the candidate is hired with some basic information about the company and the first day.

I am running into multiple problems, e.g. it seems regular mails triggered from SuccessFactors do not support (multiple) attachments. Ideally we'd like a welcome mail with attachements to be sent out 30 days before the Hire Date. Does anyone know how we could automate this?

I've been thinking about a regular recruiting template and connecting that with a hired status, but then I have no influence on the trigger. 

Thank you and best regards

Jule

entry.title: New people manager report
entry.content: Hello, We are looking to report in SF EC people who have recently become people managers. We want to be careful to not include people whose position is a higher level position to only vacant roles. We want to be able to run this report monthly to identify new managers for training, communications, etc. This should include new hires that start out as people managers from the beginning (easier) as well as people who are promoted into manager roles (harder). Having trouble figuring out how to do this - is there some effective-dated field or report that we can use for this? Or how are other people tracking manager changes? Thank you.

entry.title: Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module?

Please comment

entry.title: Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module?

Please comment

entry.title: Candidate Deleted After Employee Central Runs
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have a following case:

We have 2 employees that was hired on january, both have PY processes since it.

On begining of march the system delete the candidate profile os this users (with an automatic routine configured on our instance) and this 2 users have the Employee Central ok, the SAP registers ok for all infotypes, but their Employee Profiles appear "inactive".

The current status on Data Inspector is "d", and I tried to change it to "e" on Integration Center, and after to A of active, but I receive an error.

There is no possible to chaneg this status because the candidate was purged, so I would like to know if you know how to import this informations or correct them for I no to need to purge all user informations and redo the hire, because I don't wnat to have problems on my PY processes.

I appreciate your comments.

 

Best Regards

JC

entry.title: Access to practise environment SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi, I just bought the LearningHub lizence and started THR80. I now need to get access to the practise environment but do not understand how to get there. Could someone help me?

Best regards

Ralf

entry.title: Object Definition not coming in Manage Data
entry.content: I have created a custom Object definition but it is not available in manage Data.

entry.title: Public Sector Management in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

 Our customer's requirement is to have WBS element and would like to enable that in SF, which is enables cost assignment in position and Employee. I have worked on it and this is something new to me. Could you please let us know what are the impacts of enabling this will have in positions and it turn Recruiting Module as well.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Add higher duty or Temporary Assignment - Position to Job Sync
entry.content:
Hi,

 We would like to restrict few fields from syncing from Position to Job information only during Higher Duty/Temporary Assignment. To achieve this, we established an on-change rule at position field level and set another field called Sync as Yes or No, based on Event Reason. We couldnt write this condition directly in Position to Job Sync since Event Reason is not available in this rule scenario.

However, this on-change rule is triggered only when position field is entered manually and not when it auto populates based on the position selected in Higher Duty.@sa

Even the On Init Rules in Job information which is triggering for Add higher duty, doesn't retrieve the Event Reason or Event. Please let us know how to stop the sync for few fields only when Higher duty is triggered.

As per SAP Document, it is mentioned that it we should stop the position to Job Info sync in case of Higher Duty. Please help.

@sanjaykwadhwani

entry.title: convert a fixed term employed employee to a permanent employee - SAP Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I've hired a fixed term employee using "add new employee for fixed-term" tool, now we want to convert this employee contract to become a permanent contract, I've followed the instructions mentioned in this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Best_Practices/6026f787205245a3846a7bbf4a3b12c2/f05eab84623040f39d54c9af194cbb64.html?locale=en-US&version=2205 . However, the "end of contract" field is not disappearing as it's explained in the 8th step.

Please, what is the best practice to convert a fixed term employee to a permanent one?

entry.title: Is there a solution to prevent personal email on from being visible in Spotlight?
entry.content: In Spotlight, we only would want a team member who is assigned a business email and set as primary visible. All team members enter personal email at ONB and it may it is set to primary but not all team members receive a usable business email address later. We do not wish for the personal email address to be visible to other team members. How can we prevent this in the Spotlight feature?

entry.title: Time Valution for Bank Holiday on Saturday
entry.content:
Dear Community members 

I would need your advice in one customer's requirement:

Let me exaplain you the internal rule for weekend/public holiday work with one simple example:

Employee which is supposed to work during the Saturday, Sunday and Bank holiday records to his time sheet a single working time type "Overtime". All hours recorded as "Overtime" are subject of following rules:

1. "Overtime" recorded on SUNDAY or PUBLIC HOLIDAY should be compensated with base hourly wage of a rate "A".

2. "Overtime" recorded on SATURDAY should be compensated with base hourly wage of a rate "B".

3. "Overtime" recorded on SATURDAY  and this Saturday is in the same time PUBLIC HOLIDAY, should be compensated ONLY with base hourly wage of a rate "A".

Do you have idea how to cover cases in example No.3 with some time valuations that ensures that employee is not compensated with both rates but the rate valid for Public holiday is chosen by the valuation?

 

Many thanks, Jana

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking 

@Volker_Ruof

entry.title: Contractual Working Time
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a problem regarding the display and calculation of "Contractual Working Time".

The Situation is as follows:

Customer uses Time Tracking in combination with a third party shift planning tool.
This tool imports individual workschedules for employees as per shift requirements.

However this lead to a situation where the schedule working time from the workschedule can in fact be different from the contractual working time as from the contract agreement.

This causes a miscalculation for FLEX times as the threshold is not correct.

 

Now to portrait and calculate that correctly in the system we implemented an "extra" time type called "Contractual Working Time" and put it via an aggregation TV into the time sheet.

We then replaced the scheduled working time in the FLEX TV with the extra time and it worked perfectly.

Then we made an SF to SF integration so that this process is performed daily and automatically.

This also works nicely HOWEVER there is just one catch:

Holidays need to be exempted from that integration. That might sound easy but is not easy to pull off at all.

I was wondering how to other companies do that? Because every company that has thirdparty shiftplanning tools as well has the same problem.

I already did a customer influence request which you can find here:
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

Please share your ideas, comments and suggestions.


It is highly appreciated!

Thank you very much

Kind Regards,
Jan

entry.title: Absence Time Type Writes 0 Hours on Holidays
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to create a custom absence time type (e.g., Holiday Substitute) in SAP SuccessFactors Time Off, intended only for reporting purposes — specifically, to record 8 hours on public holidays and non-working days even though the day has no scheduled hours (holidays show 0 in Planned Working Time).
My goals are to add a time type to appear in Story Reports and Time Sheet UI and that time type must write a fixed 8-hour duration even on non-working days or holidays (No payroll integration involved – this is purely for reporting.

The method I used: 

1. Absence Counting Configuration with seemingly correct configuration and business rule assigned:  
IF <conditions> (always true)
THEN Absence Counting Rule Result Parameters.Deduction Quantity = 8

2. Defined Time Type Collision Grouping - The collision does resolve correctly when overlapping absences are created — the new time type replaces the previous one.

Result is in the Time Sheet, when this time type is used on a holiday, it shows up but with 0 hours and the same duration is written in Recorded time data v2 query table. 

I also tried creating time valuations with valuation type:  1. calculation by business rule and 2. create time type but these require Time Tracking to be enabled, which is not available in our license.

Is there a way to bypass the 0-hour issue when using only Time Off (no Time Tracking)? Is my rule maybe the issue?
Any workarounds, tips, or examples of similar setups would be greatly appreciated!
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Pull Job Information Detail of Login User in Business Rule
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We want to put some validation on Login User while performing End Of Employment for users.

Kindly guide me on how to pull Job Information field values of Login User via business rule.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Report to Audit/Manage/Control RBP and document them
entry.content:
I'm looking for a process or advice, to manage RBPs,

I inherited a SF instance, and RBPs are not being properly tracked or audited.
There's a basic report on all RBPs, but that's pretty much it.

I'm also having issues trying to understand which RBP controls which UI element.

A first baby step goals would be to understand what's on Employee on Self, and Employee on All roles, and start deciding which fields or permissions are needed.

Currently we have overlapping permissions all over the place.

I've been reading, and a Building Blocks Approach is recommended, just looking for tips on how to implement this on a chaotic environment with No RBPs logic so far.

Any guidance is welcome.

entry.title: Can any one help with function "Get Job Info String Field Value on Key Date()
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can any one provide sample rule using function "Get Job Info String Field Value on Key Date().

We are using Lookup table for accrual generation.

We have Location as Recalculation field in Time account type. But the system is not recalculating accrual amounts as soon as we change Location in Job info. And Time profile will be propagated according to Location. So, as per my understanding, system shoiuld automatically recalculate accrual amounts, but its not happening.

Please suggest if I am missing any steps.

Thank you.

Regards,

Pavani

entry.title: Give a badge in Quick Action
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Does anyone tried to create a quick action for Give a badge transaction?

Is it possible? Or there can be a standard feature in the system for that?

Thank you very much for the help.

Best Regards,

Gelo

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Platform

entry.title: Is it possible to create Table/Canvas Report to link Job Profile to Position?
entry.content:
Hello,

Did anyone manage to create a report for Job Profile that has the same data as in Manage Job Profiles drill down?

Job profile-Job Family-Job Role-Position:

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Platform
